one_sentence_fix: Give two or three of the flat argument slides genuine layered depth/light (or sharpen the hero so a distinct graphite tip visibly rests writing on the line) so the deck's craft is not carried by a single moderately-rendered hero.
shortfalls_for_email: Low-contrast counter on the lit-paper hero (S5) was darkened to graphite before ship.
S6 red annotation and the CONTEXT-NOT-NEWS stamp were darkened for legibility on paper.
Many kickers/labels render 18-23px (marked data-decorative); acceptable but recurring.
8 of 9 slides are flat editorial (deliberately argued) with one rendered pencil hero; the hero reads slightly like a gold rod without a fully distinct graphite writing tip (logged growth edge).
The DEED framework is Oct-2025 context, stamped CONTEXT, NOT NEWS; the caption frames the Kenai proposal as the new development.
verdict_note: Weighted 8.55, no hard fails, clears 8.3 (revision_rounds=2). Ships. Ceiling held by flat-heavy artwork and low-contrast accent furniture, neither gate-level.
